title: New PreToolUse hook bee-model-guard.mjs: deny bare Agent dispatches
action: Create hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs per D1/D2 of the plan. Structure copied from the sibling hooks: readStdinPayload + findRepoRoot + logCrash from bee-chain-nudge.mjs, deny convention from bee-write-guard.mjs (deliberate deny = exit 2 with the reason on stderr; everything else exit 0 fail-open, crashes appended to .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl). Logic: parse payload; if tool_name is not Agent or Task -> exit 0; if no repo root or lib/state.mjs missing -> exit 0; if !hookEnabled(root, 'model-guard') -> exit 0; if tool_input.model is a non-empty string -> exit 0; if a case-insensitive marker matching /\[bee-tier:\s*(ceiling|generation|extraction|review)\]/i appears in tool_input.description or the FIRST 500 chars of tool_input.prompt -> exit 0; otherwise exit 2 with a two-line stderr reason: line 1 states the rule (every Agent dispatch carries an explicit tier: model param or [bee-tier: <tier>] marker; bare dispatch inherits the most expensive session model — decision 0023); line 2 is a FIX line naming the configured generation model read via resolveTier/modelForTier from lib (state.mjs modelForTier(root,'generation','claude'), falling back to the literal word generation when unset). Import lib the way bee-chain-nudge.mjs does (dynamic import of .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs via libModuleUrl) so the hook works vendored in any host repo. FAIL-OPEN PRECISION (cell-review fix): an absent or non-object tool_input is an explicit early return exit 0 with EMPTY stderr — the deny branch is reachable only when tool_input is an object lacking a model string and lacking a marker. DENY EVENT LOG (plan-checker fix, gives the live payload log plan.md asks for): every deny ALSO appends one JSON line to .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl: {ts, hook:'model-guard', event:'deny', tool_name, tool_input_keys: Object.keys(tool_input)} — mkdir -p the logs dir, appendFileSync, never throw (wrap in try). ALSO create hooks/test_model_guard.mjs: a spawn-based payload-table test in the style of test_onboard_bee.mjs (node child_process.execFileSync/spawnSync on the hook with stdin payload, assert exit code + stderr). Table (from plan.md test matrix): (1) bare Agent payload -> exit 2, stderr contains 'bee-tier' AND the literal string 'FIX' AND the configured generation model name (read the expectation from .bee/config.json models.claude.generation at test runtime, tolerating string or {model} shapes, fallback literal 'generation'); (2) model:'sonnet' -> exit 0; (3) prompt '[bee-tier: ceiling] ...' -> exit 0; (4) description marker only -> exit 0; (5) '[BEE-TIER: Generation]' case-insensitive -> exit 0; (6) marker ending at prompt char 500 -> exit 0; (7) marker starting after char 500 (pad 600 chars) -> exit 2; (8) tool_input absent -> exit 0, empty stderr; (9) tool_input non-object (string) -> exit 0; (10) tool_name 'Edit' -> exit 0; (11) junk stdin -> exit 0; (12) cwd pointing at a mktemp fixture with NO .bee -> exit 0; (13) mktemp fixture root with .bee/onboarding.json + .bee/bin/lib copied from the repo + config {hooks:{'model-guard':false}} -> exit 0 (toggle respected); (14) after the bare-deny case, the last event:'deny' line in .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl JSON-parses and carries hook:'model-guard', tool_name:'Agent', and tool_input_keys as an array equal to the keys of the sent payload (['prompt','description']). Tests pass payload cwd explicitly so the repo-root walk is deterministic; no /tmp string literals handed to node APIs beyond mktemp -d output used directly (critical pattern 20260708 concerns Git Bash /tmp; use os.tmpdir()/fs.mkdtempSync in-node instead of shell mktemp to stay portable).

truths: A payload with tool_input.model set is NEVER denied, regardless of markers
A payload with no model and a [bee-tier: ceiling] marker (any case) in description or first 500 chars of prompt is allowed — ceiling stays expressible without naming a model (decision 0015 unchanged)
Non-JSON stdin, missing tool_input, unknown tool_name, no .bee repo, or hooks config {"model-guard": false} all exit 0 silently (fail-open)
The deny reason includes the string 'bee-tier' and a FIX line so the orchestrator can self-correct in one retry
Absent or non-object tool_input exits 0 with empty stderr — proven by a test row, not asserted in prose
Every deny appends a {hook:'model-guard',event:'deny',tool_name,tool_input_keys} line to .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl (the live payload-shape log plan.md requires); log failure never blocks the deny itself
hooks/test_model_guard.mjs covers all 14 table rows and is runnable standalone
prohibitions: No changes to lib/state.mjs or any existing hook
No auto-injecting or rewriting the model param — deny only
No registration edits in this cell (hooks.json/onboard_bee.mjs belong to cell 2)

trace.outcome: Added hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs (PreToolUse Agent|Task deny-only guard per D1/D2) and hooks/test_model_guard.mjs (14-row payload-table test, isolated fixtures, no /tmp literals). Fail-open on missing repo/lib/config-disabled/non-object tool_input; denies bare dispatches with a bee-tier+FIX stderr reason and logs the deny event to .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl.
